title: Webhooks
subtitle: Webhooks push your tenant's events (work order created, status change, client updated…) to a URL of your choice. Every delivery is HMAC-SHA256 signed.

empty.title: No webhook
empty.description: Create a webhook to receive TaskMgr events in your external system.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete webhook "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.
actions.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate the secret? The old secret will stop validating signatures immediately.
actions.testTriggered: Test delivery sent — check the log in ~30 seconds.

create.title: Create a webhook
create.subtitle: Pick a destination URL and the events you want to subscribe to.

reveal.title: Signing secret
reveal.warningBody: It will never be shown again. Use it to verify the X-TaskMgr-Signature header on your receiver.

log.title: Delivery log
log.subtitle: 50 most recent attempts. Refreshed every 5 seconds.
log.emptyDescription: No subscribed event has fired yet — trigger a test to see an example.
